case_title: ROBERT FORD et al VS. CATHOLIC HEALTHCARE WEST, A CORPORATION et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-14-2011 CONTINUED TO NOV-23-2011 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - DEFENDANT CATHOLIC HEALTHCARE WEST, DBA ST. MARY'S MEDICAL CENTER'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF PLAINTIFF'S 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFFS' REMAINING CLAIMS DO NOT SUPPORT THEIR REQUESTS FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES OR ATTORNEY'S FEES. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, REPORTER: TEANNA WARD, CSR # 11918

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CATHOLIC HEALTHCARE WEST, DBA ST. MARY'S MEDICAL CENTER'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S FIRST, SECOND AND THIRD CAUSES OF ACTION CONTAINED IN THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS COURTESY COPIES OF OPPOSITION PAPERS PROVIDED AT THE HEARING. ARGUED AND THE COURT SUSTAINED THE DEMURRER AS TO THE 1ST AND 2ND CAUSES OF ACTION AND SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION. PLAINTIFF TO FILE AMENDED COMPLAINT BY 11/14/11. DEFENDANT HAS 30 DAYS TO RESPOND TO AMENDED COMPLAINT. ORDER ON DEMURRER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, REPORTER: MARIA VISCIO, CSR #12353

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-12-2012 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-02-2012 Continued To Apr-27-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-13-2012 Continued To Mar-16-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-20-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling -
DEFENDANT CATHOLIC HEALTHCARE WEST dba ST. MARY'S MEDICAL CENTER'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFFS FIRST AND SECOND CAUSES OF ACTION OF THE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS Sustained without leave to amend as to the first and second causes of action. Plaintiffs fail to plead sufficient facts to prove neglect as contemplated by the EADACPS and no amendment will cure this deficiency. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: Teanna Ward, CSR # 11918 =(302/HEK)

MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-20-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling -
DEFENDANT CATHOLIC HEALTHCARE WEST, dba ST. MARY'S MEDICAL CENTER'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF PLAINTIFF'S 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS Granted. Plaintiffs' remaining claims do not support their requests for punitive damages or attorney's fees. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: Teanna Ward, CSR # 11918 =(302/HEK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-09-2011 Continued To Jan-27-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-04-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT CATHOLIC HEALTHCARE WEST, dba ST. MARY'S MEDICAL CENTER'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S FIRST, SECOND AND THIRD CAUSES OF ACTION CONTAINED IN THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

APPEARANCES: Rodney J. Key, Esq. of Law Office of Rodney J. Key for pltfs & opposing parties (appearing via CourtCall); Michael R. Laidlaw, Esq. of Porter Scott 916/929-1481 for deft & moving party.

RULING: The Court vacated its tentative ruling as courtesy copies of opposition papers provided at the hearing. Argued and the Court sustained the demurrer as to the 1st and 2nd causes of action and sustained without leave to amend as to the 3rd cause of action. Plaintiff to file amended complaint by 11/14/11. Defendant has 30 days to respond to amended complaint. Order on demurrer signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: Maria Viscio, CSR #12353

Notice And Motion To Strike Portions Of Pltf'S First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Nov-04-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT CATHOLIC HEALTHCARE WEST, dba ST. MARY'S MEDICAL CENTER'S AND MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF PLAINTIFF'S FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

APPEARANCES: Rodney J. Key, Esq. of Law Office of Rodney J. Key for pltfs & opposing parties (appearing via CourtCall); Michael R. Laidlaw, Esq. of Porter Scott 916/929-1481 for deft & moving party.

RULING: The Court vacated its tentative ruling as courtesy copies of opposition papers provided at the hearing. The Court took the motion to strike off calendar as moot in light of ruling on demurrer. Order on motion to strike signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: Maria Viscio, CSR #12353
